nation: Chippewas of Georgina Island First Nation
economic_notes: Entities consolidated include Coldwater Narrows Trust, Virginia Beach Marina, Nish Radio Inc., 2458582 Ontario Limited (Island View Business Centre), Goin Fuel Company Limited, 6832067 Canada Inc., 2697365 Ontario Limited (Hadden Road Developments), and Williams Treaty Trust. Additional unaudited schedules cover Daawegamig Lodge, Tobacco Trails, Williams Treaty Settlement, Per Capita Distribution Fund, Trust Revenue Fund, OFNLP Revenue, and IVBC Property Management Inc.
notes: Complex consolidation including trusts (Coldwater Narrows Trust, Williams Treaty Trust) and multiple commercial entities. Large portfolio investments of $180M. Significant deferred revenue increase from $8.8M to $19.7M. Long-term debt increased substantially from $2.1M to $6.9M. Remuneration schedules not visible in provided pages. Total government transfers calculated as Health Canada + CMHC + ISC + Province of Ontario = $24,782,189. OSR includes land leases, OFNLP, interest, dividends, taxation, other revenue, and investment gains.
